标题: Celine Arc de Triomphe Embroidered Jacket and Casual Pants Set. Made from custom cloud-soft twin velvet mist cotton satin, offering a soft, skin-friendly feel like being wrapped in clouds. Main tones: gray-brown and navy blue. Signature CELINE Arc de Triomphe embroidery awakens on the gray mist velvet, highly recognizable. Contrasting trim streaks across shoulders like shooting stars. Metal zippers emit a cool gleam, creating a striking visual contrast between movement and stillness. Sharp stand collar with clean lines balances softness and strength. Wear separately as statement pieces or together as an aesthetic set. Imported machine embroidery uses advanced computer-controlled precision for smooth, delicate lines. Fabric is washed for enhanced texture, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, ensuring lasting beauty. Straight, fine stitching; comfortable, soft fabric; consistent color without variation. Coordinates with matching items for a fashionable look suitable for various occasions. Custom accessories included; complete branding tags. Unisex. Sizes S-XL.

Top and Pants Celine Arc de Triomphe Embroidered School Uniform Set with Zipper Jacket and Trousers. Custom Cloud Soft Twin Velvet Mist Cotton Satin. Made with imported machine embroidery technology using advanced computer control systems and precision mechanical parts for high-precision, smooth, and delicate Arc de Triomphe embroidery. Fabric is washed for enhanced texture and feel, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, ensuring long-lasting beauty. Sizes: S-XL.

🔥 CELINE Summer Edition, original G cowhide fabric, very comfortable feel.  
Loose fit, suitable for both men and women.  
Sizes: S, M, L, XL.

CELINE Exclusive New Casual Pants – Premium Edition! Custom boutique fabric, highly breathable and comfortable, impeccable details, brand-inspired design reflecting high quality. Soft and delicate texture! Casual cut with excellent fit. Sizes: M-XL.

Celine Arc de Triomphe Ribbon Trousers, crafted from custom recycled double-sided silk satin. Silky and delicate, like a gentle touch on morning dew. Soft against the skin in off-white, contrasted by deep black for a striking visual impact. Side color-blocked ribbed ribbon adds unique linearity, accented with the signature CELINE Arc de Triomphe embroidery for high recognition. 

Designed with smooth straight-leg lines flowing seamlessly from waist to hem, embodying profound French elegance. A rare wardrobe gem featuring imported machine embroidery with advanced computer-controlled precision, delivering fine, fluid stitching. Purely hand-finished ribbon edges sewn invisibly from the inside, blending ribbon and hem flawlessly for a clean, sleek look.

Fabric is washed for enhanced texture and feel, resistant to deformation, shrinkage, and fading, ensuring lasting beauty. Available in sizes S-XL.

Celine washed slight flare jeans crafted from custom premium textured cotton denim. Classic blue base with gradient fading perfectly contours the body, highlighting alluring curves in motion. Combines hand-applied whisker distressing and gun-drawn whisker techniques for natural wrinkle effects and vivid whisker patterns. Heavy wash and fade process uses multiple physical and chemical treatments for a muted surface, followed by machine abrasion for worn effects. Distressed holes feature frayed edges achieved through physical abrasion, enhanced by high-temperature steam and sanding to remove fibers and color inconsistencies, creating unique ripped and worn details. Sizes: ---

Celine 2025SS Celine logo shorts, made from custom nylon fabric with excellent elasticity: Nylon offers high stretch and quick shape recovery, ensuring comfort, fit, and mobility. Quick-drying: The fabric dries rapidly, keeping you dry and comfortable in humid or hot conditions. The hem features a richly layered, three-dimensional classic Arc de Triomphe logo embroidered with imported computerized machines. All hardware is custom-molded. Sizes: S-XXL.

Celine Woven Cotton Cool-Touch Vertical Stripe Casual Pants. Made from lightweight, breathable woven cotton, these pants feel like a personal air conditioner for your legs—perfect for hot days with zero burden. Featuring a unique textured vertical stripe pattern that subtly adds a premium touch and visually elongates the legs for a flattering look. Loose fit with an elastic waistband accommodates all body types for maximum comfort. Ideal for city walks, workouts, or relaxing at home, offering a “no-restriction” wearing experience. The ultimate summer essential that combines style and cool comfort—everyone who wears them loves them. Available in sizes XS-L.
